message:
feat(command,store,server): harden arity validation, add Lua loop tests and conformance fixtures

Comprehensive arity and argument validation for REPLCONF (ACK, FACK,
GETACK), CONFIG (RESETSTAT, REWRITE), CLIENT (SETNAME, GETNAME, ID),
and other subcommands. Adds proper error responses for wrong argument
counts instead of silently accepting malformed commands.

Expand fr-store with improved sorted set and stream handling including
ZREMRANGEBYRANK edge case fixes. Enhance fr-server with better client
connection management.

New test coverage:
- Lua infinite/empty loop handling tests (fr-command)
- Lua bug reproduction tests (fr-command)
- ZREMRANGEBYRANK boundary condition test (fr-store)
- Server and runtime integration tests
- Conformance fixtures for MIGRATE, MODULE sentinel, PFDEBUG

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
